response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer whose technical stack (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, AI) perfectly matches the requirements. However, with over 15 years of experience, he is vastly overqualified for this explicitly entry-level position. This massive discrepancy in seniority makes him a poor fit due to likely misalignments in compensation, role scope, and career expectations.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Strong background in clean software architecture, TDD, and CI/CD.
Hits multiple nice-to-haves including LLM integration, AWS, and Kubernetes.
concerns: Vastly overqualified for an entry-level role (currently a Staff Engineer).
Compensation expectations will likely far exceed a junior budget.
High flight risk due to the limited scope and responsibilities of an entry-level position.
